title: Inside Vancouver's AI Boom (and why it matters)
fulltitle: Inside Vancouver's AI Boom (and why it matters)
description:
"What are the last keystrokes you'll type before casting your work to AI?"

In this thought-provoking keynote at the Whistler Institute, Kris Krüg—AI community leader, creative technologist, and founder of Futureproof Creatives—dives into the future of AI, ethics, and BC's leadership in creative technology.

🚀 Topics Covered:

How BC is shaping the global AI landscape through innovation in VFX, gaming, and digital arts
The biggest risks and opportunities AI presents to our creative economy
Why investing in AI literacy, ethical frameworks, and community-driven initiatives is crucial
Personal challenges for individuals and businesses to thrive in an AI-augmented future
Featuring insights from BC’s leading AI labs and industry pioneers, this talk is a must-watch for creatives, technologists, policymakers, and anyone curious about the next frontier of human-machine collaboration.

🌎 Learn more & join the movement:
🔗 www.bc-ai.net

💬 Drop a comment below—How do you see AI shaping the future of your work?

🔔 Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share to keep the conversation going!
